import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut has = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if (byte >= 48 and byte <= 57) or byte == 45 or byte == 43
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte)}"
        has = true
      else
        if has
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
          has = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()
let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let trimmed = string.trim(line2)
match string.parse_int(trimmed)
when Some(target)
  match list.index_of(nums, target)
  when Some(i)
    print("index=#{i}")
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
